    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    Buttons
    A class representing a panel of buttons for image manipulation operations.
    GUI
    GUI class to represent the graphical user interface for the multimedia application.
    ImageDisplay
    The ImageDisplay class provides functionality to load, display, manipulate, and save images.
    ImageModifier
    ImageModifier extends BufferedImage to provide advanced image modification functionalities, such as rotation, color transformations, flipping, and masking.
    ImagePanel
    ImagePanel is a custom JPanel designed to display a scaled image while maintaining its aspect ratio.
    Main
    Main class serves as the entry point for the multimedia application.
